name: nato
title: NATO regional adapter pack
description: A per-country acquisition and interpretation pack for NATO member states. The engine stays region-agnostic; this pack chooses country-specific source adapters, shared forest leaf-type sources, vegetation knowledge, and layer styling. The Netherlands adapter is implemented with AHN LiDAR elevation and PDOK aerial imagery; the Norway adapter is implemented with Kartverket NHM DTM/DOM elevation and Sentinel-2 RGB+NIR imagery because Norge i bilder WMS/WMTS requires token or Norway Digital access from this environment; the Spain adapter is implemented with IGN/CNIG PNOA-LiDAR MDT terrain, ETH canopy fallback for CHM, PNOA RGB WMS, and Sentinel-2 NIR. These EEA countries use Copernicus HRL Dominant Leaf Type for tree typing; registered countries without a national adapter build through explicit global/continental fallback sources.
coverage: NATO member states; national Tier-A paths for the Netherlands (NLD/NL), Norway (NOR/NO), and Spain (ESP/ES), global fallback for registered members without national adapters, and EEA/CLMS continental enrichment where available.

bundled.adapters/no.py: Norway Kartverket NHM DTM/DOM acquisition adapter with Sentinel-2 RGB+NIR imagery fallback
bundled.adapters/es.py: Spain IGN/CNIG MDT acquisition adapter with ETH canopy CHM fallback, PNOA RGB, and Sentinel-2 NIR
bundled.adapters/eea.py: Shared Copernicus HRL Dominant Leaf Type plus CLC+/Natura context fetchers
bundled.adapters/global.py: Global fallback: Copernicus GLO-30 terrain, ETH canopy, Sentinel-2 imagery, CGLS/WorldCover typing
bundled.vegetation.py: NATO vegetation typing hook with leaf-type grid support
